A '''skitter''' was a small animal known to infest buildings. The [[Verkuylian Imperial Governor's Hall|Imperial Governor's Hall]] on [[Verkuyl]] had a skitter problem late in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Skitters could be recognized by the sounds of their squeaks and scurrying claws. They had voracious appetites, said to eat almost anything (though not metal).

==Appearances==
